title: feat: add admin youtube controlled canary preflight
goal: Add read-only admin controlled canary preflight evaluation for future YouTube network canary planning without enabling real network execution.

risks.risk: Preflight endpoint is mistaken for network authorization.
risks.mitigation: Result remains network_enabled false and code_ready_network_blocked requires absent network authorization.

risks.risk: Sensitive configuration or credential material leaks through admin output.
risks.mitigation: Endpoint accepts enum statuses only and tests reject secret-like output.
Implementation only evaluates pure input and tests use app.inject without write calls.
